methodology.allergens: Strict mode (2026-04-24): flag an allergen ONLY when an ingredient is unambiguously a source. Dairy = milk/buttermilk/butter/cream/cheese/yogurt/labneh/ranch/sour cream/ghee. Eggs = egg/mayo/aioli/hollandaise/ranch/sriracha mayo/truffle mayo. Gluten = bread/flour/bun/bagel/wrap/pita/wheat/pasta/oats/panko/breadcrumbs/soy sauce/gochujang (NOT corn tortilla, hashbrowns, chicken sausage, falafel unless explicit). Soya = soy sauce/tofu/edamame/gochujang/miso/Biscoff. Sesame = sesame seeds/tahini/za'atar (NOT dukkah unless explicit). Fish = salmon/tuna/cod/anchovy (NOT Worcestershire trace). Crustaceans = shrimp/prawn/crab/lobster. Molluscs = mussel/clam/oyster/squid/octopus. Nuts = explicit tree nut/Nutella/almond butter (NOT dukkah, NOT 'might contain'). Peanuts = peanut/peanut butter. Sulphites = ONLY wine/explicit sulphite-preserved/dried fruit (NOT pickles/gherkins/capers/balsamic/vinegar). Mustard, Celery, Lupin, Lentils = explicit only. Sugared drink = Coke/Sprite/Fanta full-sugar only. Recipes with no matching allergen are tagged ['NO_ALLERGENS']. Results deduplicated and sorted alphabetically.
methodology.calories: Estimated from ingredient quantities using USDA/standard food composition per-100g values. Wastage not applied. Rounded to nearest integer. Estimates only — verify with lab testing for regulatory labeling.
methodology.wastage_pct: Stored as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.05 means 5%).

changelog.entry: Moved 'Bagel (Plain)' from packaging[] to ingredients[] in recipe #11 (B.E.C. Bagel).
Moved 'Bagel (Sesame)' from packaging[] to ingredients[] in recipe #12 (Lox and Cream Cheese).
Moved 'Bagel (Sesame)' from packaging[] to ingredients[] in recipe #13 (Grilled Halloumi Bagel).
Moved 'Bagel (Sesame)' from packaging[] to ingredients[] in recipe #14 (Avocado & Egg Bagels); bagel was present in packaging (no data gap); flagged pending decision to verify bagel variant.
Recomputed allergens for bagel recipes using UAE/GCC 14-allergen standard (added Gluten for all bagels; added Sesame Seeds for sesame bagels). Deduplicated and sorted.
Recomputed calories for bagel recipes (Plain bagel +250 kcal, Sesame bagel +250 kcal).
Moved 'Strawberry (Frozen/Fresh)' / 'Strawberry (Fresh/Frozen, halved)' from packaging[] to ingredients[] in overnight-oats and açaí recipes (strawberry is food, not packaging).
Added last_updated 2026-04-22 at top level.
Merged Smoked Salmon Toast SKU — kept Chilled 80g as canonical, deleted Frozen 50g variant per operator decision. Recipes renumbered to 1-45.
Renamed 'Maple Syrup (Taste Basics Honey)' -> 'Maple Syrup' in Raw Maple Syrup recipe.
Slashed ingredient resolved (Triple Cheese Fold): 'Side Salad Greens (Lollo Rosso/Iceberg)' -> 'Side Salad Greens (Lollo Rosso)'.
Slashed ingredient resolved (Turkish Eggs): 'Ghee (AMUL/Aseel)' -> 'Ghee (AMUL)'.
Slashed ingredient resolved (Turkish Eggs): 'Smoked Paprika / Aleppo Pepper' -> 'Aleppo Pepper'.
Slashed ingredient resolved (Middle Eastern Nourish Bowl): 'Falafel (frozen/pre-made)' -> 'Falafel (frozen)'.
Slashed ingredient resolved (Salmon Superfood Bowl): 'Rice / Quinoa Base' -> 'Rice (Sushi)'.
Slashed ingredient resolved (Salmon Superfood Bowl): 'Olive Oil / Lemon Dressing' -> 'Olive Oil'.
Slashed ingredients resolved in açaí bowls: 'Blueberry/Strawberry/Mango/Pineapple/Raspberry (Fresh/Frozen)' -> '(Frozen)' variants in recipes #21, #22, #26.
Slashed ingredient resolved (Grilled Halloumi Slices): 'Fresh Thyme / Oregano' -> 'Fresh Thyme'.
Slashed ingredient resolved (Seasonal Fruit Cup): 'Blueberry / Grapes' -> 'Blueberry'.
Slashed ingredient resolved (Chipotle Aioli): 'Chipotle Powder / Chipotle in Adobo' -> 'Chipotle Powder'.
Slashed ingredient resolved (Classic Guacamole): 'Chilli Flakes / Jalapeño' -> 'Jalapeño'.
Slashed ingredients resolved across overnight oats (#39-#45): Blueberry/Raspberry/Strawberry/Mango/Pineapple (Fresh/Frozen) -> (Frozen) variants.

Rebuilt Shakshuka #8 tomato base: replaced 50g combined 'Tomato Paste (Anna) / Peeled Tomato' with 15g Tomato Paste (Anna) + 120g Peeled Tomato (canned, crushed). Calories 384 -> 403 kcal. Added user-confirm-with-chef note.

Normalized to canonical schema v1.0: added schema_version, consolidated methodology + changelog, dropped cost_* fields (none present), ensured per-recipe key order and always-present 5-key ingredient/packaging shape with notes field.
Accuracy fix (Classic Smashed Avocado #2): deduplicated Avocado Hass (0.5 Piece + 15 GM -> 0.5 Piece, wastage 0.2 preserved).
Unit normalization: Sourdough Bread 'Piece' -> 'Slice' in Truffled Mushroom Scramble #1.
Applied menu renames to recipe JSON — Protein Açaí → Nut Butter Açaí (#23); Sriracha Sauce → Sriracha Mayo (#34).
Generalized bagel ingredient names — type is customer modifier. Conservative Gluten+Sesame allergen declaration. Cleared bagel-type pending decision.

Re-tagged allergens across all 45 recipes using new ZwQ 16-tag taxonomy (Celery, Gluten, Crustaceans, Fish, Eggs, Lupin, Molluscs, Mustard, Nuts, Peanuts, Sesame, Soya, Sulphites, Sugared drink, Dairy, Lentils). Collapsed 'Milk (Dairy)' and specific nut/grain tags into taxonomy buckets. Updated methodology.allergens.

Re-derived allergens in strict 'essential only' mode per updated rule (dialed back over-tagging on gluten/dairy/eggs/sesame/peanuts/sulphites). Recipes with no unambiguous allergen source now tagged ['NO_ALLERGENS']. Updated methodology.allergens to describe strict mode.
